auth.label: Management API access token
auth.description: Auth0 Management API access token sent as a Bearer token. Create a Machine-to-Machine application and authorize it for the Auth0 Management API.

extraFields.label: Tenant domain
extraFields.description: Auth0 tenant domain used to build https://TENANT_DOMAIN/api/v2 requests. Use the domain from your Auth0 application or tenant settings.

actions.name: add_permissions_to_role
actions.description: Associate one or more Auth0 permissions with a role.

roleId.description: The Auth0 role ID, such as rol_abc123.

permissionName.description: The Auth0 permission name, mapped to permission_name.

resourceServerIdentifier.description: The Auth0 resource server identifier, mapped to resource_server_identifier.

items.description: An Auth0 Management API permission reference.

permissions.description: Auth0 permissions to associate with or remove from the role.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

success.description: Whether the Auth0 role update request completed successfully.

actions.name: assign_roles_to_user
actions.description: Assign one or more Auth0 roles to a user.

userId.description: The Auth0 user ID, such as auth0|abc123.

items.description: The Auth0 role ID, such as rol_abc123.

roleIds.description: Auth0 role IDs to assign or remove.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

success.description: Whether the Auth0 role update request completed successfully.

actions.name: get_role
actions.description: Retrieve one Auth0 role by role ID.

roleId.description: The Auth0 role ID, such as rol_abc123.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

role.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Retrieve one Auth0 user by user ID.

userId.description: The Auth0 user ID, such as auth0|abc123.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

user.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

actions.name: list_role_permissions
actions.description: List permissions granted by an Auth0 role.

roleId.description: The Auth0 role ID, such as rol_abc123.

page.description: Zero-based Auth0 page number to request.

perPage.description: The number of Auth0 records to return per page.

includeTotals.description: Whether Auth0 should return a totals wrapper.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

permissions.description: Auth0 permissions returned by the Management API.

items.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

anyOf.description: The raw Auth0 Management API array response.
A raw Auth0 Management API object.

raw.description: The raw Auth0 Management API list response.

perPage.description: The number of Auth0 records to return per page.

includeTotals.description: Whether Auth0 should return a totals wrapper.

take.description: The number of Auth0 users to retrieve with checkpoint pagination.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

users.description: Auth0 users returned by the Management API.

items.description: A raw Auth0 Management API object.

A raw Auth0 Management API object.

raw.description: The raw Auth0 Management API list response.
